_readme: v7 + QA 수동 확정 (겹침·소음 라인 실측)
title: Don't do anything I wouldn't do
expression: Don't do anything I wouldn't do

sentences.en: Huh? Oh, I get it. You guys do love each other.
sentences.ko: 아~ 알겠다. 너네 둘이 진짜 좋아하는 거구나.

sentences.en: ★ Don't do anything I wouldn't do.
sentences.ko: ★ 적당히들 놀아. (나라면 안 할 짓은 하지 마)

sentences.en: Okay, good bye. All right, all right.
